title: TEKFUN 2 Pack LCD Writing Tablet, 8.5inch Colorful Drawing Tablet for Kids, Erasable Writing Drawing Board with Lanyard, Learning Toys Gifts for 3 4 5 6 7 Years Old Boys Girls Toddlers (Blue+Pink)
features: 【2 PACKS FOR SHARING】 We saw many scenes of children fighting for a single toy. So we include 2 packs of TEKFUN writing tablets for you to avoid a war and bring boys and girls a peacefully sharing world. When more imaginations collide, more inspiration is sparked. You would absolutely clap for the masterpiece that merged with kids' imaginations!

【ANTI-LOST STYLUS LANYARD】 Does your kid always complain he couldn't find his stylus? We include an extra lanyard for each TEKFUN doodle board to avoid that. Where there is the writing tablet, there is a stylus by side.

【3-STEP DRAWING】Draw-Unlock-Erase. Kids could pick up on how to use it quickly for only 3 steps, even toddlers. The lock feature is great for keeping the drawing or message on the screen. When you’re ready to erase it you simply slide the LOCK SWITCH at the bottom left to OFF and then press the ERASE button and you would get a blank screen in a blink of an eye.

【LIGHT WEIGHT TRAVEL ESSENTIALS】 The weighs only 106g doodle board is easy to tote around and could be tucked in school bags, handbags, and travel bags without burden. A big hit for road trips, car travel, airplane, restaurant, church, daycare, doctor's offices, etc. Keep kids occupied on the go or kill time in any waiting rooms.

【PERFECT GIFT FOR KIDS】TEKFUN Writing tablet is a perfect toy gift for kids, definitely bringing them boundless excitement. Whatever the birthday, Christmas, Easter, Valentine's Day, back-to-school supplies, etc. A suitable gift toy for 3 4 5 6 7-year-old boys and girls. Multi-use for all age groups, even toddlers, children, teens, or adults.

【EDUTAINMENT IN LIFE】"Interest is the best teacher". TEKFUN drawing pad could be the best choice for sparking kids learning enthusiasm. Parents can guide children to draw, doodle, write or spell words on the drawing board. Kids could play games or cosplay with friends. Kids' patience, creativity, imagination, and hand-eye coordination skills could be better improved in daily time.

【ELECTRONICS ALTERNATIVES】 LCD screen with no blue light, no glare, radiation-free, and can depict a dreamy and colorful world and writes in "rainbow". Even with a long-time user of this electronic drawing pad, your eyes will not be tired at all. Great Electronic alternative for preventing kids' visual impairment.
